messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
Yes, the hexadecimal color code #1e90ff represents a shade of teal blue.
The hexadecimal color code #008080 represents a shade of teal. It is often referred to as "teal green" or "dark teal."
The hexadecimal color code #1e90ff is commonly referred to as "Dodger Blue."
